cause_analysis.narrative: Red Scissors hair salon churned on 2026-04-24 after 58 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 23-day silence starting 2026-01-21. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-09 via sms, client wrote: "How it will work out…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
